# bithost

> Privacy-first cloud VPS reseller powered by DigitalOcean, Linode, and Vultr. Pay with Bitcoin, Lightning Network, Ethereum, Monero, and 300+ other cryptocurrencies. No KYC, no credit card, no identity verification. Hourly billing with no auto-renewals. Operating since 2014.

bithost lets anyone deploy a Linux or Windows cloud server anonymously using crypto. Servers are provisioned in minutes across 30+ global locations. Full root access via SSH. Manage everything from the web dashboard or the bh CLI. Servers start at $0.015/hr, billed hourly with no monthly minimum or auto-renewal; minimum top-up is $20.

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://bithost.io/): Overview of the service, providers, billing model, and supported cryptocurrencies
- [Prices](https://bithost.io/prices): Full pricing tables for DigitalOcean, Linode, and Vultr plans - CPU, RAM, storage, and hourly/monthly rates
- [FAQ](https://bithost.io/faq): Answers on crypto payments, billing, server limits, account security, and balance management
- [Pay with Crypto](https://bithost.io/pay-with-crypto): Full list of accepted cryptocurrencies - Bitcoin, Lightning Network, ETH, DOGE, LTC, USDC, SOL, and more
- [Dashboard](https://dashboard.bithost.io/): Login, top up balance, deploy and manage servers
- [API & CLI](https://bithost.io/bithost-cli-api/): Overview of the REST API and bh command-line tool
- [API Docs](https://bithost.io/bithost-cli-api/api): Full REST API reference - authentication, endpoints, request/response format
- [CLI Docs](https://bithost.io/bithost-cli-api/cli): bh CLI installation, commands, and usage examples
- [Full API & CLI Reference](https://bithost.io/llms-full.txt): Complete API endpoints, error codes, cURL examples, and bh CLI command reference

## Buy a VPS with crypto

- [Bitcoin VPS](https://bithost.io/bitcoin-vps): Buy a DigitalOcean, Linode, or Vultr VPS with Bitcoin or Lightning - run a node, BTCPay Server, or any Linux workload
- [Anonymous VPS](https://bithost.io/anonymous-vps): No-KYC, no-card VPS hosting - email-only signup, paid in crypto, since 2014
- [Windows VPS with Bitcoin](https://bithost.io/windows-vps-bitcoin): Windows Server VPS on Vultr paid in crypto, full RDP access, licence included
- [VPS with USDC](https://bithost.io/usdc-vps): Pay for a VPS with USD Coin - exact-dollar billing, no exchange-rate risk, no KYC
- [VPS with Monero](https://bithost.io/monero-vps): Pay for a VPS with Monero (XMR) - private by default, no public payment trail, no KYC, no card
- [Accepted Cryptocurrencies](https://bithost.io/accepted-cryptocurrencies): Full list of 300+ accepted coins and tokens across Bitcoin, Ethereum, BNB Chain, Tron, Solana, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism and Base
- [DigitalOcean with Crypto](https://bithost.io/digitalocean-with-crypto): DigitalOcean does not take crypto directly - deploy a real DigitalOcean Droplet paid in Bitcoin or 300+ coins via bithost, no card, no KYC
- [Linode with Crypto](https://bithost.io/linode-with-crypto): Linode (Akamai) does not take crypto directly - deploy a real Linode instance paid in Bitcoin or 300+ coins via bithost, no card, no KYC
- [Vultr with Crypto](https://bithost.io/vultr-with-crypto): Deploy a real Vultr instance paid in Bitcoin, Monero, or 300+ coins via bithost - no Vultr account, no KYC. Also where bithost offers Windows VPS

## Guides - Getting Started

- [How to Deploy a VPS with Bitcoin](https://bithost.io/guides/getting-started): Create an account, top up with crypto, and deploy your first VPS in minutes
- [How to Choose the Right VPS Plan](https://bithost.io/guides/choose-the-right-plan): Understand CPU, RAM, storage, and bandwidth and pick the right plan for your workload
- [How to Connect to Your VPS via SSH](https://bithost.io/guides/connect-via-ssh): Generate SSH keys on Mac, Linux, or Windows and connect from your terminal
- [Understanding Your Server Dashboard](https://bithost.io/guides/understanding-your-dashboard): Tour of every tab in the bithost control panel - details, rebuild, resize, backups, events

## Guides - Account Security

- [How to Enable Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)](https://bithost.io/guides/enable-2fa): Protect your account with an authenticator app - setup, QR code, and confirmation
- [How to Set Up SSH Keys for Your VPS](https://bithost.io/guides/ssh-keys): Generate a key pair and add your public key before deploying a server
- [Disable SSH Key Auth and Enable Password Login](https://bithost.io/guides/disable-ssh-keys): Switch a Linux VPS from key auth to password login, with safety steps

## Guides - Security

- [How to Secure Your VPS](https://bithost.io/guides/secure-your-server): Harden a Linux server - non-root user, disable root SSH, UFW firewall, Fail2Ban, auto-updates
- [How to Set Up Backups for Your VPS](https://bithost.io/guides/automated-backups): bithost automatic backups and snapshots, plus rsync and database dumps
- [How to Monitor a VPS for Suspicious Activity](https://bithost.io/guides/monitor-suspicious-activity): Check logins, auth logs, processes, network connections, and disk usage

## Guides - Web Hosting

- [How to Host a Website on a VPS with Nginx](https://bithost.io/guides/host-a-website-with-nginx): Install Nginx, configure a server block, and serve your site
- [How to Install WordPress on a VPS](https://bithost.io/guides/install-wordpress): Self-host WordPress on the LEMP stack (Nginx, MySQL, PHP) on Ubuntu 22.04
- [How to Set Up HTTPS with Let's Encrypt (Free SSL)](https://bithost.io/guides/setup-ssl-https): Set up HTTPS on Nginx with Certbot and auto-renewal
- [How to Point Your Domain to Your VPS](https://bithost.io/guides/point-domain-to-server): Add an A record, wait for DNS propagation, and test your domain

## Guides - Use Cases

- [How to Set Up a WireGuard VPN on a VPS](https://bithost.io/guides/setup-vpn-server): Run a private, self-hosted WireGuard VPN you fully control
- [How to Run a Game Server on a VPS](https://bithost.io/guides/game-server): Set up a Minecraft server on a VPS, plus tips for Valheim, Terraria, and CS2
- [How to Self-Host Cloud Storage with Nextcloud](https://bithost.io/guides/nextcloud-cloud-storage): Self-host Nextcloud on a VPS as a private Google Drive alternative
- [How to Host a Node.js or Python App on a VPS](https://bithost.io/guides/host-nodejs-python-app): Deploy with PM2 or Gunicorn and Nginx as a reverse proxy

## Guides - Performance & Scaling

- [How to Scale Your VPS Resources](https://bithost.io/guides/scale-server-resources): Vertical vs horizontal scaling, block storage, and dedicated/bare-metal upgrades
- [How to Monitor CPU, RAM & Disk Usage on a VPS](https://bithost.io/guides/monitor-resource-usage): Built-in tools (top, htop, df) and ongoing monitoring with Netdata
- [How to Migrate a Website to a VPS](https://bithost.io/guides/migrate-a-website): Move files and databases, test via the hosts file, then switch DNS
- [How to Set Up Docker on a VPS](https://bithost.io/guides/setup-docker): Install Docker and Compose, run containers, and use Nginx as a reverse proxy

## Guides - Troubleshooting

- [What to Do If Your Server Is Unreachable](https://bithost.io/guides/server-unreachable): Diagnose and fix SSH, firewall, Nginx, and resource issues
- [How to Recover from a Failed Deployment](https://bithost.io/guides/failed-deployment): Roll back broken configs, revert code, restore a database or snapshot
- [Common Server Errors and How to Fix Them](https://bithost.io/guides/common-errors): Fixes for SSH, 502/504/403/404 Nginx, MySQL, disk full, and SSL errors

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](https://bithost.io/privacy): What data is collected, retention periods, cookie usage, and user rights
- [Terms of Service](https://bithost.io/terms): Acceptable use, account limits, billing, refund policy, and liability
